g.title: gabbro_crypto_stack
g.text: passphrase → Argon2id → X25519 + ML-KEM-1024 → HKDF-SHA256 → AES-256-GCM (header bound as AAD)

g.title: note_aad
g.text: VERSION 7+ header integrity: the entire plaintext header
— Argon2 params, salts, ML-KEM ciphertext, X25519 pubkey,
YubiKey records, alias, passphrase_blob — is the AES-GCM AAD.
Any header tamper makes body decryption fail.

g.title: note_v10
g.text: VERSION 10 (RT-3): the X25519 static secret is bytes [0..32]
of the KDF output used directly (clamp at DH), removing the
StdRng PRNG from the seal path. v2–9 keep the legacy StdRng
derivation so existing vaults still open; derivation is
version-dispatched on the parsed file version.

g.title: note_pp
g.text: Passphrase change re-runs Argon2id + KEX and re-wraps
wrapping_key into a new passphrase_blob; key_blobs and
the vault body are unchanged (any one key still opens).
YubiKey slots keep the "…-v1" combiner at every version.
